allow: Bash(python -c "from flux.subagent import SubAgent, SUBAGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT; print\('Import success'\)")
Bash(python -c "from flux.subagent import SubAgent; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(SubAgent.run\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from flux.subagent import SubAgent; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(SubAgent._build_assistant_message\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from flux.subagent import SubAgent; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(SubAgent._execute_tool\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from flux.tools.registry import ToolRegistry; from flux.tools.bash import BashTool; from flux.tools.read import ReadTool; t = ToolRegistry\(\); t.register\(BashTool\(\)\); print\('bash:', t.get\('bash'\)\); print\('todo:', t.get\('todo'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from flux.tools.subagenttool import SubAgentTool; print\('Import successful'\); print\(f'Name: {SubAgentTool.name}'\); print\(f'Description: {SubAgentTool.description[:80]}...'\)")
Bash(python -c "from flux.tools import SubAgentTool, TodoTool, TodoState, TodoItem; print\('All exports successful:', SubAgentTool, TodoTool, TodoState, TodoItem\)")
Bash(python -c "from flux.cli import SYSTEM_PROMPT; print\('subagent' in SYSTEM_PROMPT\)")
